title: rubus mulleri subsp. splendidus
intro: Rubus mulleri subsp. splendidus, also known as the splendid raspberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus mulleri plant, a type of wild raspberry native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Rubus mulleri subsp. splendidus include its high content of anthocyanins, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain diseases. Rubus mulleri subsp. splendidus can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, or other medicinal products.
